groups.title: Groups
groups.emptyDesc: Create or join a group to compete with friends
groups.publicDesc: Anyone can find and view this group
groups.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete the group and all its data.
groups.removeMemberConfirmMessage: {{name}} will be removed from the group.
groups.leaveGroupConfirmMessage: You will lose access to this group.

customLeaderboards.title: Custom Leaderboards
customLeaderboards.emptyDesc: Create a custom leaderboard to rank specific players
customLeaderboards.thresholdDesc: Players need this many games to leave provisional status
customLeaderboards.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete the leaderboard.
customLeaderboards.groupAttachedNote: This leaderboard is linked to a group. Members are managed through the group — adding or removing users there will automatically apply here.

location.suggestCityDesc: Your suggestion will be reviewed and added if approved.
location.cooldown: Location can only be changed once every 30 days
